helpful: The provisioned petition and questions presented exposed the claims and vehicle issues.
The snapshot captured the requested-response, extension, fee-class, and amicus signals.
The statpack supplied paid-petition and Ninth Circuit calibration baselines.
gaps: CourtListener MCP opinion search remained rate-limited, so independent appellate-opinion retrieval was unavailable.
No brief in opposition was yet available because the response deadline had been extended.
notes: Corpus queries worked but required sizable ranged reads and yielded broad recent priors rather than close substantive analogues.
